title: scorzoneroides cantabrica
intro: Scorzoneroides cantabrica, also known as Cantabrican scorzoneroides or Cantabrian crown daisy, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to the Cantabrian Mountains in northern Spain. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides cantabrica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
